title: Dekton Geckoslide 24pc Felt Pads with Nails- Furniture Protectors| Prevent Scratches & Noise| Self-Adhesive| Ideal for Chairs, Tables, Appliances| Durable Felt Material| Includes Nails for Attachment
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Ultimate Furniture Protection: Safeguard your floors and furniture from unsightly scratches, dents, and damage with Dekton Geckoslide Felt Pads. Designed to provide a protective barrier between your furniture and floors, these pads help maintain the pristine condition of your surfaces.

Noise Reduction Technology: Enjoy a quieter home environment by minimizing noise from chair and table movement. The high-density felt material of these pads acts as a cushion, reducing the clattering sound often associated with shifting furniture, perfect for a peaceful living space.

Self-Adhesive and Easy Installation: Featuring a strong self-adhesive backing, these felt pads are quick and simple to apply. No need for additional tools or complicated procedures—just peel, stick, and protect. Ideal for both DIY enthusiasts and those seeking convenience.

Enhanced Durability with Nails: For added security and longevity, each pad comes with accompanying nails. This dual attachment method ensures the pads remain firmly in place, even under heavy use, making them suitable for various types of furniture including chairs, tables, and appliances.

High-Quality Felt Material: Crafted from durable, premium felt, these pads provide a robust and resilient cushion. The material is not only effective in preventing scratches but also ensures long-term use without compressing or deteriorating, offering lasting value and performance.
description: The Dekton Geckoslide 24pc Felt Pads with Nails are an essential addition to your home for protecting your furniture and floors from scratches and noise. These high-quality furniture protectors are designed to provide a seamless shield for a variety of surfaces, including chairs, tables, and appliances. Made from durable felt material, these pads offer a reliable barrier between your furniture and floors, effectively preventing unsightly scratches and reducing the noise caused by moving furniture. Each pad is self-adhesive, making installation quick and easy; simply peel off the backing and apply to the bottom of your furniture. For added security and peace of mind, the package includes nails that ensure a firm attachment, even on high-traffic items. This dual-attachment system ensures that the pads stay in place, providing long-lasting protection. The felt material is not only gentle on floors but also enhances the smooth movement of furniture, making it easier to rearrange your space without dragging or scraping. Whether you have hardwood, laminate, or tile floors, the Dekton Geckoslide pads are designed to blend seamlessly with any decor while offering superior protection. Ideal for use on a wide range of furniture items, these pads help preserve the beauty of your floors and extend the lifespan of your furniture. The set includes 24 pads, providing ample coverage for multiple items throughout your home.
